design.athlete: Mark, 50 — MTI SF50 band, generated from MTI database
progression_rules: Emphasis: strength. Main lifts wave [5, 4, 3, 3] reps (heavy, ~3-5 = true strength per Galpin); add load, hold the reps.
Power first on strength days — 5x3 explosive (Galpin: power fades fastest after 50).
Fri = weekly VO2max session: 4-5 x 4 min @ Zone 5 (Attia/Galpin zone-5 dose).
Zone 2 toward Attia's ~3 hr/wk: Tue [50, 55, 55, 50], Sat [75, 85, 90, 75] min + Fri intervals.
Every 4th block is a deload (lower volume) — age-appropriate 3:1 loading.
If a top set isn't clean, repeat the week instead of progressing.

Mon.summary: Heavy: Trap-Bar Deadlift + Bench Press @ {reps} reps
Mon.detail:
(Target ~50 min — keep rest tight.)
Warm-up + stability ~6 min: WGS + band pull-aparts, then 8/side Single-Leg RDL (slow) + 10/side Pallof Press (anti-rotation).
Strength — 4 rounds: Trap-Bar Deadlift @ {reps} reps + 3-5 Pull-Up.  (no-gym: Hip Bridge)  3-sec eccentric on the first set.
Strength — 4 rounds: Bench Press @ {reps} reps + 3-5 Pull-Up.  (no-gym: Hand Release Push Up)
Finisher — 3 rounds: 10 Weighted Sit Up.
Cool-down: 2 min easy + 30s dead hang.
Mon.detail_bw:
(Target ~50 min — keep rest tight.)
Warm-up + stability ~6 min: WGS + band pull-aparts, then 8/side Single-Leg RDL (slow) + 10/side Pallof Press (anti-rotation).
Strength — 4 rounds: Hip Bridge @ {reps} reps + 3-5 Pull-Up.  3-sec eccentric on the first set.
Strength — 4 rounds: Hand Release Push Up @ {reps} reps + 3-5 Pull-Up.
Finisher — 3 rounds: 10 Weighted Sit Up.
Cool-down: 2 min easy + 30s dead hang.

Tue.detail:
Zone 2 — run / row / bike / spin / ruck / hike. Conversational, HR 125-135.
Duration: {tue} min.
Cool-down: 5 min easy + calf/hip stretch.
Tue.detail_bw:
Zone 2 — run / row / bike / spin / ruck / hike. Conversational, HR 125-135.
Duration: {tue} min.
Cool-down: 5 min easy + calf/hip stretch.

Wed.detail: Full rest day. Wed rest is non-negotiable.

Thu.summary: Power + Back Squat + Barbell Bent Over Row (8-12 reps, muscle)
Thu.detail:
(Target ~50 min — keep rest tight.)
Warm-up + stability ~6 min: WGS + band pull-aparts, then 8/side Single-Leg RDL (slow) + 10/side Pallof Press (anti-rotation).
Power (first, fresh) — 5 x 3 Box Jump: explosive intent, max speed.
Hypertrophy — 3 sets x 8-12 Back Squat @ ~70% (2-sec lower) + 8-10 Pull-Up.  (no-gym: Wallking Lunge)
Hypertrophy — 3 sets x 8-12 Barbell Bent Over Row @ ~70% (2-sec lower) + 8-10 Chin-Up.  (no-gym: Run, Row, Spin/Bike, Ruck)
Finisher — 3 rounds: 10 Weighted Sit Up.
Cool-down: 2 min easy + 30s dead hang.
Thu.detail_bw:
(Target ~50 min — keep rest tight.)
Warm-up + stability ~6 min: WGS + band pull-aparts, then 8/side Single-Leg RDL (slow) + 10/side Pallof Press (anti-rotation).
Power (first, fresh) — 5 x 3 Box Jump: explosive intent, max speed.
Hypertrophy — 3 sets x 8-12 Wallking Lunge @ ~70% (2-sec lower) + 8-10 Pull-Up.
Hypertrophy — 3 sets x 8-12 Run, Row, Spin/Bike, Ruck @ ~70% (2-sec lower) + 8-10 Chin-Up.
Finisher — 3 rounds: 10 Weighted Sit Up.
Cool-down: 2 min easy + 30s dead hang.

Fri.detail:
(Target ~50 min.)
Warm-up — 6 min easy build to threshold.
VO2max (the priority) — 4 x 4 min @ Zone 5 (hard, ~90% max HR) + 3 min easy. Run / row / bike / uphill ruck — pick one.
Short grind finisher — {wcap} min: 6 Hand Release Push Up + 6 In-Place Lunge + 10 Sandbag Good Morning + 10 Superman Hold.
Cool-down: 3 min easy + hip-flexor stretch.
Fri.detail_bw:
(Target ~50 min.)
Warm-up — 6 min easy build to threshold.
VO2max (the priority) — 4 x 4 min @ Zone 5 (hard, ~90% max HR) + 3 min easy. Run / row / bike / uphill ruck — pick one.
Short grind finisher — {wcap} min: 6 Hand Release Push Up + 6 In-Place Lunge + 10 Hip Bridge + 10 Superman Hold.
Cool-down: 3 min easy + hip-flexor stretch.

Sat.detail:
Zone 2 long / ruck @ 20kg — run / row / bike / spin / ruck / hike. Conversational, HR 125-135.
Duration: {sat} min.
Cool-down: 5 min easy + calf/hip stretch.
Sat.detail_bw:
Zone 2 long / ruck @ 20kg — run / row / bike / spin / ruck / hike. Conversational, HR 125-135.
Duration: {sat} min.
Cool-down: 5 min easy + calf/hip stretch.

Sun.detail: Full rest day. Sun rest is non-negotiable.
